title: LightwalletdClient::connect failure reported as SendPaymentError::Db
description: Trigger: LWD endpoint unreachable or TLS failure during send_fn closure. The map_err(SendPaymentError::Db) in commands.rs produces '[pay] Payment error: database error: could not connect to lightwalletd'. Db variant implies local storage fault; an operator reading logs will debug the wrong component. Should be a dedicated SendPaymentError::Connect variant or mapped to Broadcast.
close_reason: Added SendPaymentError::Connect variant; updated commands.rs map_err
